title: Caterer Job Scraper - Production v2.0
description: Production-grade scraper using impit + Playwright with advanced stealth. Provide keyword/location OR a direct search URL. Features: HTTP-first strategy, UK residential proxies, job detail scraping, and intelligent error handling.

startUrl.title: Start URL (Optional)
startUrl.description: Direct Caterer.com search URL. If provided, overrides keyword/location parameters.

keyword.title: Job Keyword
keyword.description: Job title, role, or skill keywords (e.g., 'Chef', 'Sous Chef', 'Restaurant Manager', 'Bartender')

location.title: Location
location.description: City, region, or postcode (e.g., 'London', 'Manchester', 'Edinburgh'). Leave empty for all UK locations.

collectDetails.title: Collect Job Details
collectDetails.description: Fetch full job descriptions from individual job pages. Includes: descriptionHtml, descriptionText, jobType, applyUrl. (Slower but more complete data)

results_wanted.title: Results Wanted
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of jobs to collect (1-1000). Actor stops when this limit is reached.

max_pages.title: Max Pages
max_pages.description: Maximum search result pages to process (safety limit). Stops if no jobs found on a page.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of parallel requests (1-5). Lower values = fewer blocks but slower. Recommended: 2-3 for RESIDENTIAL proxies.

strategy.title: Fetch Strategy
strategy.description: HTTP-first: Fast HTTP requests with Playwright fallback (recommended). Playwright-only: Always use full browser rendering (slower, more reliable).

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: ⚠️ RESIDENTIAL proxies highly recommended for UK sites. Default: GB RESIDENTIAL IPs for best results.
